titleStmt.title: SII 15.206: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 206. (B.K. No. 95 of 1928-29.) YAḌIHAḶḶI, BILGI PETHA, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of Rāmaliṅga temple.
This commences with the well known Vachana of Siddharāma. From the identity of the royal praśasti that follows, the inscription appears to belong to a Yādava ruler of Dēvagiri.
The epigraph being damaged and fragmentary, almost all the details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī Ōṁ jaya paramēṣvara paramātma [Īsvara]nurvvīparvvi
yaḍaṁgikoṁḍippanu vōrbbaṁṇigeyāgi yō
gigaḷa manada koneya jōtīśvaranuṁ vriśabharūrāgi yajamā
nanuṁ Ācāryanuṁ tāna Āgi yōgādi saṁpaṁna khaḷeyaṁgaḷe
llamaṁ saṁpādisi yōgaramaṇīya kṣētramane staḷaviṭṭu saḷā
khaviḍidu Abhinava śrīśaiḷamane māḍi kapilasiddhamalligaradēva
ru nelasi niṁdu puṁṇyapāpaṁgaḷaṁ baraṁ pēḷdu besaṁ pēḷta
viralu Ēṁ besaṁ dēvā yenalu Ī stānadalu māṁnyavāgi Ūru
gaḷaṁ bhūmigaḷaṁ dhanaṁgaḷaṁ Ī liṁgakke hastōdakaṁ māḍi
koṭṭuduvaṁ manaṁ pēsade kaḷadukoṁḍapeneṁbātana mā
tā mātāpitrugaḷellamaṁ Eppattēḷu kōṭi varṣaṁbaraṁ puḷugoṁ
ḍada narakadoḷikki nīnāhutigoḷuttiru gaṁḍā Ele pāpave yī
dēvana bhūmi dhanakkānaṁjuveneṁdu pāvaḍardaṁte manaṁ bedaṟi poḍava
ṭṭanaṁ bēga śīghraṁ koṁḍu bā kaṁḍā Ele puṁṇyavē nīṁ kaviḷā
sakke yiṁtī Eraḍara beṁge puṁṇyapāpaṁgaḷuṁ pārddukoṁḍiddu
yvudu tappadu diṭha diṭhaṁ satyaṁ gaṁḍire [Eṁbadu] guru vacanavu .
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabdāḷaṁkrita śrīmadvija
ya mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara pa
ramabhaṭṭāraka dvārāvatīpuravarādhīsvaraṁ viṣṇuvaṁśōdbha
vaṁ yāThe continuation is
Digital edition of SII 15.206 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
